reports.name: Superhittegolven
reports.query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        shg.STATION             AS stationsCode,
        st.OMSCHRIJVING         AS station,
        shg.VOLGNR              AS volgnr,
        shg.BEGIN               AS begin,
        shg.EINDE               AS einde,
        shg.DAGEN               AS dagen,
        shg.SUPERTROPISCH       AS supertropisch,
        shg.TMAX                AS tmax
    FROM superhittegolven shg
    JOIN stations st ON st.CODE = shg.STATION
) _t
WHERE 1=1
<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY begin
